_doc: EU AI Act Annex IV §1(c) — model lineage / supply-chain record.
served_via: uvicorn FastAPI worker @ macm1:9302, MLX inference (Metal)

weights_file.comment: Original safetensors checksums on HF; MLX 4-bit local conversion via mlx_lm.convert -q 4 --q-group-size 64.

modifications_post_download: Domain LoRA adapters loaded at runtime — see output/adapters/devstral/
intended_use: Public chat playground at https://ml.saillant.cc/chat/eu-kiki/devstral-24b — code generation across Python/Rust/TS/C++/SQL via LoRA adapters.
out_of_scope: Generating malware, exploits or vulnerability research without authorisation
Code requiring formal verification (medical, avionics) without human review
Autonomous code execution on production systems
